data.content:
All working. Here's a summary of the implementation:

### Files Created/Modified

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `TicketClassifier.csproj` | Added `Microsoft.ML 4.0.2` + CSV copy rule |
| `Models/TicketModels.cs` | ML.NET data classes, request/response DTOs |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | Model training (SDCA MaxEntropy), evaluation, prediction |
| `Controllers/TicketController.cs` | API endpoints with input validation |
| `Program.cs` | DI registration of classifier service |

### Endpoints

- **`POST /api/ticket/classify`** — Predicts category with confidence scores
- **`GET /api/ticket/metrics`** — Returns evaluation metrics (accuracy, log-loss)

### Verified Results

```
Metrics:  MacroAccuracy=1.0, MicroAccuracy=1.0, LogLossReduction=0.9998
Billing test  → Billing  (97.6% confidence)
Technical test → Technical (44.3% confidence)
General test  → General  (96.2% confidence)
```

The pipeline featurizes Subject + Description text, concatenates with Priority, normalizes, and trains with SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass classifier.
